headline: New Abbott data show many people with diabetes may not recognize symptoms of diabetic ketoacidosis
summary: Abbott (NYSE: ABT), the global healthcare leader, announced new data revealing diabetic ketoacidosis (DKA) remains an important, yet often undetected health concern for people living with both Type 1 and Type 2 diabetes. Findings from multiple Abbott studies shared at the American Diabetes Association's (ADA) June 2026 86th Scientific Sessions show sharp increases in DKA-related hospitalizations across all age groups nationwide. The data reinforces that while diabetes technology has advanced sig
